name: ARMOUR Residential REIT Inc. 7% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (liquidation preference $25.00 per share)
summary: ARMOUR Residential REIT Inc. 7% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a type of preferred stock issued by ARMOUR Residential REIT, a real estate investment trust focused on investing in residential mortgage-backed securities. This series C preferred stock offers a fixed dividend and has liquidation preference. ARMOUR Residential REIT is headquartered in Vero Beach, Florida.
